title: Niflheim's Random Additions
description: A bunch of random stuff I added because I wanted to.
body:
This is a mod for me to have fun adding whatever I want. I try to make it so the items or blocks won't be too unreasonable. There's a lot of random stuff added. If you want a good idea of what's in the mod, check the changelog.

Notable Things (In version 1.0.0):

- Instahouse: Creates a house out of thin air.
- Shadial: An important gem found only in the Deep Dark.
- Lunar Lantern: Launches mobs away when they get within 5 blocks of this block.
- Blazium Gem: A hot gem that is made from blasting Diamond.
- Diamond Detector: Detects diamonds in a 20x20x20 block radius around the player.
- Lantern Bow: Fires a projectile. Where the projectile lands, a lantern is placed. It uses lanterns as ammo.
- Ender Bow: Fires a projectile that teleports you to where it lands. It uses regular arrows as ammo.
- Totem of Unbreaking: All the normal Totem of Undying effects, but it also summons 3 Iron Golems.
- Lots of advancements. I like them.

Hope you enjoy, I suppose.
